description:
This diagram illustrates the spatial aggregation logic for converting a 2x2 block of 10m cells (DLTC 10m) into a single 20m cell (DLTC 20m). The aggregation follows a specific set of rules based on the values present in the 10m input cells. The values represent distinct classes, colour-coded as: 0 (white), 1 (green), 2 (green-ish), 3 (red), 4 (orange), 10 (grey), and 12 (yellow).

The aggregation rules demonstrated by the examples are:
